ns0:entry.ns0:title: Andyyyy64/whichllm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Andyyyy64/whichllm
Language: python
Find the local LLM that actually runs and performs best on your hardware. Ranked by real, recency-aware benchmarks, not parameter count. One command, run it instantly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LMCache/LMCache
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LMCache/LMCache
Language: python
LMCache: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/SkillSpector
Language: python
Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/physicsnemo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/physicsnemo
Language: python
Open-source deep-learning framework for building, training, and fine-tuning deep learning models using state-of-the-art Physics-ML methods

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Open-LLM-VTuber/Open-LLM-VTuber
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Open-LLM-VTuber/Open-LLM-VTuber
Language: python
Talk to any LLM with hands-free voice interaction, voice interruption, and Live2D taking face running locally across platforms

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR
Language: python
Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach
Language: python
Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RyanCodrai/turbovec
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RyanCodrai/turbovec
Language: python
A vector index built on TurboQuant, written in Rust with Python bindings

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sumanth077/Hands-On-AI-Engineering
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sumanth077/Hands-On-AI-Engineering
Language: python
A curated collection of practical AI projects implementing OCR systems, RAG, AI agents, and other AI use cases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chopratejas/headroom
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chopratejas/headroom
Language: python
Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: comet-ml/opik
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/comet-ml/opik
Language: python
Debug, evaluate, and monitor your LLM applications, RAG systems, and agentic workflows with comprehensive tracing, automated evaluations, and production-ready dashboards.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: huggingface/OpenEnv
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huggingface/OpenEnv
Language: python
An interface library for RL post training with environments.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maziyarpanahi/openmed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maziyarpanahi/openmed
Language: python
Local-first healthcare AI: clinical NER & HIPAA PII de-identification that runs 100% on-device. 1,000+ medical models, 12 languages, Apple MLX + Python, no cloud, no patient data leaving your network. Apache-2.0

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/markitdown
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown
Language: python
Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelscope/FunASR
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelscope/FunASR
Language: python
Industrial-grade speech recognition toolkit: 170x realtime, 50+ languages, speaker diarization, emotion detection, streaming, and OpenAI-compatible API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: music-assistant/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/music-assistant/server
Language: python
Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill
Language: python
AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

ns0:entry.ns0:title: roboflow/supervision
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/roboflow/supervision
Language: python
We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

ns0:entry.ns0:title: safishamsi/graphify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/safishamsi/graphify
Language: python
AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: soxoj/maigret
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/soxoj/maigret
Language: python
🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites
